<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [CloudXNS (Deprecated)](https://github.com/go-acme/lego/issues/2323) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/cloudxns/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "cloudxns"
  dnsCredentials:
    # CLOUDXNS_API_KEY: The API key
    apiKey: ""
    # CLOUDXNS_SECRET_KEY: The API secret key
    secretKey: ""
    # CLOUDXNS_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: )
    httpTimeout: ""
    # CLOUDXNS_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: )
    pollingInterval: ""
    # CLOUDXNS_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: )
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # CLOUDXNS_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: )
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
